result:
All tasks complete. Here is the summary:

## Source edits summary

**`BirdCLEF-2026-Codebase/inference.py`** -- Replaced the stub inference (which just copied sample_submission.csv) with a full probe-bundle inference pipeline that:
- Loads the trained `probe_bundle.pkl` (scaler, PCA, per-class LogisticRegression models, prior tables, mapping context)
- Loads cached Perch embeddings/scores (test cache if available, train cache for local dry-run)
- Applies the same Bayesian prior fusion used during training (site/hour prior blending, texture/event lambda weighting, texture smoothing)
- Runs per-class probe models with the same feature engineering (sequential features, prototype similarity, family mean)
- Applies Gaussian smoothing and sigmoid conversion
- Writes a properly formatted submission CSV with row_id and per-class probability columns

**`BirdCLEF-2026-Codebase/configs/generated/bundle-parity-cpu-only-submission-dry-run.yaml`** -- Already existed with identical settings to default.yaml, which is correct for parity reproduction. No changes needed.

**Verified**: Training produces `val_soundscape_macro_roc_auc=0.673` (consistent with baseline). Inference generates a 708-row, 234-class submission CSV from the probe bundle. The full train-then-infer pipeline is end-to-end runnable.
